column1: HERA = Housing and Economic Recovery Act. LIHTC = low-income housing tax credit. PIS = LIHTC properties placed in service database.
Note: American Samoa placed 119 properties in service using the Tax Credit Exchange Program (TCAP), but otherwise does not actively administer LIHTCs and therefore is exempt from HERA requirements.
